searchQuery.title: Search Query
searchQuery.description: Vehicle search keyword (e.g. Tesla, Ford F-150). When set, adds a keyword search URL and post-filters lot titles.

maxCatalogues.title: Max Catalogues
maxCatalogues.description: Maximum number of catalogues to process per list page

maxPages.title: Max Pages
maxPages.description: Maximum number of list/search pages to paginate

minYear.title: Minimum Year
minYear.description: Minimum vehicle model year for the DealerScope standard lane

maxMileage.title: Maximum Mileage
maxMileage.description: Maximum accepted mileage for the DealerScope standard lane
